summary: Despite some observed trends in specific cancer types such as glioblastoma, there is currently no conclusive clinical evidence demonstrating that metformin has a proven antitumor effect. Thus, according to existing medical knowledge derived from reviewed trials, metformin lacks verified antitumor capabilities.
